---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? What pain point do you experience with current navigation tools or NaviEU?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be specific about how it would work.

## User Story

As a [type of user], I want [feature] so that [benefit].

## Alternative Solutions

What other approaches have you considered? Why is this one preferred?

## Offline Considerations

How should this feature work when the device has no internet connectivity?

## Privacy Considerations

Does this feature require data collection, network calls, or cloud storage? How can it be implemented while preserving NaviEU's privacy-first principle?

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples from other apps, or anything else that helps illustrate your request.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to implement this feature myself
- [ ] I would need guidance to implement this
- [ ] I cannot implement this but can help test
- [ ] I am just suggesting the idea
